mapper.sql: interface_id, interface_name, interface_uri, interface_group_name, resource_id, resource_name, resource_type, create_id, create_name, create_date, modify_id, modify_name, modify_date, del_flag, version
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sm_interface_conf WHERE del_flag = 1
and interface_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.interfaceName},'%')
and interface_group_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.interfaceGroupName},'%')
